summary: Scaffolded the native TypeScript MCP server within src/mcp-server/, integrated @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, and implemented the read-only get_iteration_state tool.

validation_evidence.startup_sanity: server started correctly and reported 'Team Agents Cowork MCP Server running on stdio'

implementation_details.get_iteration_state_source: Resolved dynamically via absolute path relative to __dirname: path.resolve(__dirname, '../../workflow/iteration-state.json')
